title: Origins: Classes (Forge)
description: An unofficial Forge port for Origins: Classes
body:
### General Information
* This is an unofficial Forge port for [Origins: Classes](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-classes).</br>
* This mod work as a add-on for [Origins (Forge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/origins-forge).</br>
* This mod is never porting to lower versions as [Origins (Forge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/origins-forge) is not stable enough and no longer maintained on those version.</br>

In addition to choosing an origin, you now also choose a class. Classes provide smaller benefits than origins, but they come without drawbacks.</br>

### List of classes
* Archer: your projectiles are more accurate; you are slowed less when using a bow</br>
* Beastmaster: animals you tame gain permanent extra hearts and damage; when you drink a potion the effects also apply to nearby tamed animals</br>
* Blacksmith: tools and armor crafted by you provide small benefits; you can repair tools and armor more efficiently, both in an anvil and via crafting</br>
* Cleric: you can refine the potions to make it's instant effects stronger and it's lasting effects longer; you are better at enchanting</br>
* Cook: food you craft provides more nourishment; you gain extra XP from cooking food in a smoker</br>
* Explorer: you start the game with 9 empty maps, a compass and a clock; you don't exhaust from sprinting</br>
* Farmer: bone meal is twice as effective when used by you; crops sometimes yield twice the loot when you harvest them</br>
* Lumberjack: crafting planks from logs gives you two extra planks; you cut down whole trees at once when you use an axe</br>
* Merchant: when you trade with villagers, their trades aren't used up; wandering traders give you special offersv
* Miner: you break all stone blocks faster; you don't exhaust from mining blocks</br>
* Nitwit: you're not particularly good at anything :)</br>
* Rancher: when you breed animals, they sometimes have a chance to produce twins; animals killed by you have a chance of dropping twice as much loot</br>
* Rogue: your name is never visible through walls; you enter stealth (making less sounds and dealing double damage from behind) after sneaking for 10 seconds</br>
* Warrior: you deal +1 attack damage with every weapon; you are slowed less when using a shield</br>

### Datapacks
You can add your own classes with datapacks by creating an origin, and then adding it to the layer at data/origins-classes/origin_layers/class.json.</br>
But you may not use power types provided [Origins: Classes](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-classes) as they're discarded/rewritten.</br>
